title: iria microcarya
intro: Iria microcarya is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Iria microcarya include relief from congestion, fever reduction, and improved respiratory function. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal purposes.
